name: Ryan Nash, Mortgage Broker NMLS #1493480
description_short: Ryan Nash Home Loans is a Colorado Springs-based mortgage broker offering purchase, refinance, and specialty loans across CO, ID, NC, and FL through Elevation Mortgage.
description_long:
Ryan M. Nash Home Loans operates as a mortgage broker team based in Colorado Springs, Colorado, affiliated with Elevation Mortgage and financed by Xpert Home Lending Inc. The business is owned/operated by Ryan Nash (NMLS #1493480) and holds company NMLS #2179191, with licensure across Colorado, Idaho, North Carolina, and Florida. The company positions itself as a full-service mortgage advisory firm targeting borrowers at all experience levels, from first-time home buyers to experienced investors.

The company offers a comprehensive range of mortgage products including conventional loans, FHA loans, VA loans, jumbo loans, and refinancing options. They provide specialized services such as debt consolidation through cash-out refinances, HELOC products, VA refinancing, rehabilitation loans, and reverse mortgages. Pre-qualification services are available to help borrowers understand affordability before house hunting. The firm emphasizes educational resources on topics like credit improvement, loan comparison (fixed vs. adjustable), and home buying fundamentals.

Ryan Nash Home Loans differentiates itself through multi-state licensing and claims of "some of the lowest rates nationwide." The team emphasizes personalized guidance based on individual financial situations rather than one-size-fits-all solutions. They actively target underserved borrower segments including first-time buyers, veterans (VA loans), and homeowners seeking debt consolidation using home equity.

A factual assessment reveals this is a legitimate, licensed mortgage broker with verifiable NMLS credentials. However, the website makes broad claims about competitive rates without specific rate comparisons or lock-in guarantees. The company relies on lead generation (Apply Now forms) rather than transparent pricing upfront. Service breadth is genuinely strong, but the lack of concrete rate examples, fee schedules, or third-party reviews limits ability to independently verify service quality or value.
address: 7 E Bijou St Suite 217, Colorado Springs, CO 80903

company_info.headquarters: 7 E Bijou St Suite 217, Colorado Springs, CO 80903

pros: Licensed across four states (CO, ID, NC, FL) with verified NMLS credentials for individual and company
Offers full spectrum of loan types including VA loans, FHA, conventional, jumbo, and reverse mortgages
Specializes in debt consolidation using home equity and cash-out refinancing as financial planning tools
Provides pre-qualification and down payment estimation before house hunting to set realistic expectations
Free educational resources on credit building, loan comparisons, and first-time buyer guidance
Accessible local team in Colorado Springs with dedicated phone line (719) 629-7401
Addresses niche segments (veterans, first-time buyers, vacation home purchasers) with targeted loan products
cons: Website claims 'some of the lowest rates nationwide' but provides no rate quotes, rate locks, or comparative data to verify
No published fee schedule or closing cost breakdown available on website for transparency
Limited third-party reviews or testimonials to independently assess customer service quality or satisfaction
Generic website content (loan education pages) does not demonstrate unique expertise or competitive advantage
Operates as a broker (not a direct lender), which may result in slower processing than direct lenders and limited rate transparency
best_for: Colorado, Idaho, North Carolina, and Florida residents seeking multi-product mortgage shopping from one broker
Veterans eligible for VA loans who want specialized guidance on VA financing benefits and refinancing
Homeowners with existing equity looking to consolidate high-interest debt through cash-out refinancing
First-time home buyers needing pre-qualification, education, and down payment guidance
diagnosis: Best for multi-state borrowers (especially CO, ID, NC, FL residents) and veterans seeking a full-service mortgage broker with diverse loan products and educational support. Main caveat: claims of competitive rates lack substantiation; borrowers should obtain rate quotes from multiple lenders before committing, and request a detailed Loan Estimate to compare fees and lock-in terms.
services: FHA loans with down payments as low as 3.5%
VA loans for veterans with U.S. Veterans Administration guarantees
Rehabilitation loans for property improvement financing
Fixed vs. adjustable rate comparison and guidance
Closing cost estimation and financial planning
meta_description: Ryan Nash Home Loans is a Colorado Springs mortgage broker offering purchase, refinance, and specialty loans across multiple states.
